injury_alerts.title: Latest NBA buzz: Embiid out with appendicitis, Curry ruled out Thursday

0852cffec341701f6a0dde8619ae9f56.ai_analysis:
💡 推薦：芝加哥公牛 +6.5

公牛真實勝率高達69%，且近期以31分痛宰巫師，實力差距明顯。儘管盤口顯示主隊讓分，但獨贏賠率持續向公牛傾斜，顯示市場對公牛仍具信心，受讓6.5分應可輕鬆過關，該傷兵資訊極大可能為誤植。

53b49bbe56f8581f353bbbb5c6179ac5.ai_analysis:
💡 推薦：**Toronto Raptors -3.5**

主隊暴龍擁有較高的真實勝率 (60%)，且僅兩天前才以大比分 (121-95) 擊敗熱火，顯示其在對戰上具明顯優勢。在無傷兵、無疲勞警示的情況下，暴龍在主場讓分3.5分相當合理。雖然獨贏賠率有微幅調整向熱火傾斜，但幅度不大，未構成急速移動或聰明錢訊號，不足以動搖暴龍的強勁基本面。

bf30a732402325cab54ab666ee0f5c11.ai_analysis:
💡 推薦：New York Knicks 讓分 -2.5

尼克擁有較高的真實勝率，且其獨贏賠率大幅下降（賠率從1.555降至1.475），顯示市場對其信心顯著增強，有明顯的聰明錢流入跡象。考量到無傷兵與疲勞問題，預期尼克能順利過盤。

625bbdf7bc0bdf1d57b3f97742908221.ai_analysis:
【💡 推薦：讓分盤 客隊 Indiana Pacers -28.5】

溜馬擁有壓倒性91%真實勝率，且獨贏賠率從1.635急速下探至1.04，聰明錢訊號明確導向溜馬。昨日交手溜馬以29分大勝籃網（94-123），恰好涵蓋當前28.5分的讓分盤口，無傷兵或疲勞影響，綜合判斷溜馬極有可能再次打出大比分差距。

nba.summary: Jayson Tatum had 24 points, 13 rebounds and eight assists in 40 minutes Thursday night but, more importantly, walked "off the floor on my own two feet."

nba.title: Sixers' Embiid undergoes surgery for appendicitis
nba.summary: Philadelphia 76ers star center Joel Embiid underwent emergency surgery in Houston on Thursday after being diagnosed with appendicitis a few hours before the team fell to the Rockets 113-102 in a pivot

nba.title: Donovan not reading into Reinsdorf's endorsement
nba.summary: Bulls coach Billy Donovan, who has yet to decide on his future with the team, appreciated team president and CEO Michael Reinsdorf's endorsement of him but said he understood "everybody's got to look

nba.title: Sarr (toe) to miss Wizards' final three games
nba.summary: Wizards forward Alex Sarr is likely to miss the final three games of the season with a toe injury.

nba.title: OKC locks up No. 1 seed, joins elite company
nba.summary: The Thunder clinched the NBA's best regular-season record with a win over the Clippers to join some exclusive company.

nba.title: NBA fines Magic $25K for injury report violation
nba.summary: The NBA fined the Orlando Magic $25,000 on Thursday for violating league injury reporting rules before Monday night's home game against the Detroit Pistons.

nba.title: Stanford star freshman Okorie declares for draft
nba.summary: Stanford star guard Ebuka Okorie will enter the NBA draft after leading the ACC in scoring as a freshman.

nba.title: Sources: Kings' late foul was error, not tanking
nba.summary: The NBA is looking into what team sources say was a strategy mistake by Kings coach Doug Christie -- and not tanking tactics -- during Tuesday's loss to the Warriors.

nba.title: 🏀 NBA draft top 100: Where top prospects land
nba.summary: Here is the updated top 100 big board for the 2026 class after an exciting college season.

nba.title: NBA postseason intel: Six big questions we're watching right now
nba.summary: Are the Lakers toast? Is the Spurs' 3-point prowess real? We canvass the league on six storylines that could define the postseason.

soccer.title: Guardiola would 'love' Silva to stay at Man City
soccer.summary: Pep Guardiola says he would "love" captain Bernardo Silva to "finish his career" at Manchester City but it is up to the player to make the decision on whether he stays or leaves this summer.

soccer.title: I feel complete backing from owners and fans - Slot
soccer.summary: Liverpool manager Arne Slot insists he feels "complete support" from the club's hierarchy and fans despite a run of poor on-field performances and growing discontent about his future as manager

soccer.title: Howe '100% committed' to Newcastle but 'I just need support'
soccer.summary: Head coach Eddie Howe says he is "100% committed" to Newcastle United, but it is "very difficult" to look too far beyond the end of the season.

soccer.title: 'Hungry' Watkins is man on mission - but will Tuchel take notice?
soccer.summary: Ollie Watkins' response to being dropped by England has been nothing short of emphatic, with two strikes in Bologna adding to his goal against West Ham before the international break.

soccer.title: Is Fernandes' own goal the worst of all time?
soccer.summary: Porto's Martim Fernandes scored a bizarre own goal for Porto against Nottingham Forest on Thursday, but how does it compare to the worst of all-time?

soccer.title: Egypt goalkeeper banned for striking referee
soccer.summary: Al-Ahly goalkeeper Mohamed El-Shenawy banned for four games for striking a referee on the head following an Egyptian Pro League match.

soccer.title: Littler v Rooney in nine-dart challenge
soccer.summary: Darts world number one Luke Littler takes on Wayne Rooney in a nine-dart challenge.

soccer.title: We asked fans of Premier League clubs how they are feeling - find out the results
soccer.summary: As the Premier League returns after a three-week hiatus, we asked fans how they are feeling about their club.

soccer.title: Sutton's predictions v boxing promoter & Arsenal fan Frank Warren
soccer.summary: Chris Sutton takes on boxing promoter Frank Warren plus the BBC readers and AI with his predictions for this weekend's Premier League fixtures.

soccer.title: Premier League must protect teams in Europe - Pereira
soccer.summary: Nottingham Forest boss Vitor Pereira has urged the Premier League to protect teams playing in Europe by easing their schedules.
